chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1686 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 05.12.2025 *** None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. This petition was instituted on 25.10.2021, however, no one is pursuing it since inception, which prima facie reflects that petitioner has lost interest in the matter. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
